title: Men charged with kidnapping reappear in court
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The three men accused of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The three men accused of kidnapping a 16-year-old girl from a residence in the JCC Camp last year briefly reappeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on Friday 19 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The three men accused of kidnapping a 16-year-old girl from a residence in the JCC Camp last year briefly reappeared in the Mossel Bay Regional Court on Friday 19 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The case has been postponed once again until 13 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The men (aged 30, 38 and 48) are facing charges of kidnapping and abduction and were previously denied bail.","html":"The men (aged 30, 38 and 48) are facing charges of kidnapping and abduction and were previously denied bail."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Last Christmas Eve, the girl was reported missing by her aunt.","html":"Last Christmas Eve, the girl was reported missing by her aunt."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The suspects were arrested just outside Caledon on Christmas Day, hours after the girl’s disappearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was reunited with her family later that day and the men have remained in police custody since.","html":"She was reunited with her family later that day and the men have remained in police custody since."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Bail denied for men accused of kidnapping","Alleged kidnappers of girl in court","Girl allegedly abducted in Da Gamaskop reunited with family","Alleged kidnapping: bail postponed for 10 April","Bail application for alleged kidnappers postponed","Alleged kidnappers' bail postponed again"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Men charged with kidnapping reappear in court
